prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: A crew used a field method for Panelboard installation & makeup that is less tidy than the preferred shop approach but still matches the listed product instructions and the project requirement. No local amendment or drawing note forbids it. Reference material on hand: NEC Art. 408, 110.26 (working clearance), 200.4.
title: Judgment call: Panelboard installation & makeup (residential job)
